subject: A massive green-skinned bearded giant in a green tunic hoisting a stone maul overhead, set against a forest backdrop
description: A hulking giant with green-tinted skin and a long braided dark beard stands in a forest clearing, lifting an enormous two-handed stone maul above his head in a powerful overhead pose. He wears a simple green sleeveless tunic cinched with a brown belt and a long green kilt-like skirt, with leather straps crossing his torso. His arms are thick and corded with muscle, and his expression is determined and proud. Behind him rise dense trees in deep forest greens, with dappled light filtering through the canopy. The palette is dominated by saturated greens — leaf, moss, and pine — with warm earthy browns in his clothing and the stone of his weapon. The composition is a heroic mid-to-wide shot framing him as a towering figure of the woodland.
foreground: giant in green tunic raising a stone maul overhead
background: dense forest canopy with filtered light
emotion: determined, proud, defiant — chin lifted, weapon raised in a show of strength
